New Year's Wish Amulet

Once in a while, the unit's max health increases by 60% for 4 sec. During this time, the unit's attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 20% of the unit's max health to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. Also, the unit restores health equal to 80% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Sage bot code: AM72

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 6 secs
